reviews.review_body: It was a beautiful school..but i just went to write my exams there...but the look was great but don't know why they had lots of staircases for same floors..in different styles....

reviews.review_body: Went for admission of my child and they ask 2lacks donation for KG child. To pay in cash so account will be of that money. Principal is also very rude.

reviews.review_body: My son studies here best school for children their teaching methods are unique and friendly . Covid times have taken a toll but hats off to school teachers for keeping the spirit of kids ,kudos and mostly recommended
